title: FriendQuest (R-I9 / R-L8) — a co-op quest shared by TWO friends: finish `goal_lessons` lessons TOGETHER. Shared, both-member-readable state (unlike own-row friendship). Progress is SERVER-DERIVED from each member's durable user_course.lessons_completed counter (baseline snapshot at create/accept) so neither client can inflate it.

creator_id.description: The learner who created (and invited to) the quest. FK -> user.

partner_id.description: The invited friend. FK -> user. Set at creation from the resolved @handle.

goal_lessons.description: Combined lessons the pair must finish together (design default 12).

creator_baseline.description: Snapshot of the creator's SUM(user_course.lessons_completed) at creation; progress counts only lessons finished AFTER this.

partner_baseline.description: Snapshot of the partner's SUM(user_course.lessons_completed) at ACCEPT time. NULL while status='pending' (partner has not accepted).

status.description: pending|active|completed|declined|cancelled (stored as text; engine maps unknown -> pending for forward-compat).

completed_at.description: When combined progress first reached goal_lessons (NULL until then).
